name: Sock-it-to-me Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
Streusel Topping:
2 tablespoons Confectioner's sugar
1 teaspoon Chopped nuts
1 teaspoon Cinnamon
Topping:
2 tablespoons Brown sugar
1 teaspoon Cinnamon
Mix the cake mix, sugar, and oil well. Add eggs and beat until combined. Stir in sour cream and chopped pecans. Grease a bundt pan with butter. Mix together the streusel topping ingredients and sprinkle over the bottom of the pan. Pour half of the cake batter into the pan, then top with the remaining batter.
Bake at 350°F for 55-60 minutes.
